structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoints as Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active endpoints vary by Zone Group mode. In Occupied, Cooldown, Setup: cooling maximum = Vcool-max, minimum = Vmin (Occupied) or 0 (others). In Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied: cooling maximum = 0, minimum = 0.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Table 5.9.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode: Occupied: Cooling maximum Vcool-max, Minimum Vmin; Cooldown: Cooling maximum Vcool-max, Minimum 0; Setup: Cooling maximum Vcool-max, Minimum 0; Warmup: Cooling maximum 0, Minimum 0; Setback: Cooling maximum 0, Minimum 0; Unoccupied: Cooling maximum 0, Minimum 0.
